sn29.2:1.1: At Sāvatthī. "Bhikkhus, there are these four modes of generation of nāgas … . sn.iii.241
sn29.2:1.2: "Therein, bhikkhus, nāgas born from the womb, from moisture, and born spontaneously are superior to nāgas born from eggs. Nāgas born from moisture and born spontaneously are superior to nāgas born from eggs and from the womb. Nāgas born spontaneously are superior to nāgas born from eggs, from the womb, and from moisture.
sn29.2:1.3: "These, bhikkhus, are the four modes of generation of nāgas."
